prompts.name: Candles
prompts.text: Add candles with warm flames, melted wax detail, and gentle light spill into the scene.

prompts.name: Vase of Flowers
prompts.text: Add a vase of flowers with natural stems, petals, glass or ceramic detail, and balanced placement.

prompts.name: Bookshelf
prompts.text: Add a bookshelf with varied books, small objects, and believable lived-in detail.

prompts.name: Wall Paintings
prompts.text: Add framed wall paintings or art prints as tasteful background decoration without distracting from the subject.

prompts.name: Decorative Rug
prompts.text: Add a decorative rug with woven texture, pattern detail, and natural placement on the floor.

prompts.name: Curtains
prompts.text: Add curtains with soft fabric folds, natural drape, and interaction with window light.

prompts.name: String Lights
prompts.text: Add string lights with warm glow, gentle bokeh, and cozy decorative atmosphere.

prompts.name: Indoor Plants
prompts.text: Add indoor plants with healthy leaves, varied shapes, and natural home detail.

prompts.name: Mirror
prompts.text: Add a mirror with believable reflection, frame detail, and careful placement within the composition.

prompts.name: Wall Clock
prompts.text: Add a wall clock with readable shape, decorative frame, and subtle environmental storytelling.

prompts.name: Chandelier
prompts.text: Add a chandelier with glass or crystal detail, warm light, and elegant room atmosphere.

prompts.name: Paper Lanterns
prompts.text: Add paper lanterns with soft glow, delicate texture, and festive or traditional atmosphere.

prompts.name: Cushions
prompts.text: Add cushions or pillows with soft fabric, natural compression, and cozy domestic detail.

prompts.name: Scrolls
prompts.text: Add scrolls or rolled parchment with aged paper texture and fantasy or scholarly mood.

prompts.name: Decorative Crystals
prompts.text: Add decorative crystals with faceted surfaces, gentle reflections, and mystical charm.
